  "claims": [
    "The United States is consistently one of the only countries with a persistent problem with gun violence.",
    "People in the United States are 25 times more likely to be killed in a gun homicide than those living in other developed countries.",
    "California has had more than 12,000 gun homicides since 2014.",
    "Individuals deemed mentally incompetent in misdemeanor cases continue to retain their firearm rights under current law.",
    "The legislation aims to ban individuals found mentally incompetent to stand trial from possessing or purchasing firearms.",
